name: @aily-project/lib-radiolib
author: Jan Gromes
description: 通用无线通信库，支持LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68)等多种射频模块
description_zh_cn: 通用无线通信库，支持LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68)等多种射频模块
description_en: Universal wireless communication library supporting LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68) and other RF modules
description_zh_hk: 通用無線通訊庫，支援LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68)等多種射頻模組
description_ja: LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68)などの多種RFモジュールをサポートする汎用無線通信ライブラリ
description_ko: LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68) 등 다양한 RF 모듈을 지원하는 범용 무선 통신 라이브러리
description_de: Universelle drahtlose Kommunikationsbibliothek für LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68) und andere RF-Module
description_fr: Bibliothèque de communication sans fil universelle prenant en charge LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68) et d'autres modules RF
description_es: Biblioteca de comunicación inalámbrica universal compatible con LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68) y otros módulos RF
description_pt: Biblioteca de comunicação sem fio universal com suporte a LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68) e outros módulos RF
description_ru: Универсальная библиотека беспроводной связи с поддержкой LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68) и других RF-модулей
description_ar: مكتبة اتصالات لاسلكية شاملة تدعم LoRa (SX127x/SX126x/SX128x/LLCC68) ووحدات RF أخرى
